reason: Earlier compute-parallelism measurements are not valid for density/frontier claims if MAC outputs were not connected to the full datapath or if equivalence did not cover the full sequential path.
notes: Keep this note in comparison reports so old optimistic results are not reused accidentally.

reason: The HBM/DRAM service-energy result used explicit but unsourced command-class pJ parameters. The follow-on source-backed aggregate HBM calibration preserved the selected energy family but changed the dominant energy component from compute to HBM, so compute-dominance claims from the uncalibrated command-class result should not be reused alone.
notes: Use command-class HBM service results only after source-backed calibration or with this caveat attached.
